channel.title: Schedule on Hi there
channel.description: Recent content in Schedule on Hi there

item.title: Schedule Management
item.description: Need three things. Schedule mangement Like calendar Alert function To do management check up style easy to see all lists Daily summary easy to find by keyword And most important thing : Easy to access and edit in macbook, ipad, and iphone. To do so, Apple calendar and 3. Notion is the best combination. I used to work with notability or goodnotes, but the app is best option for only ipad.
